sms.settings.title: SMS Gateway
sms.settings.description: Send text messages to attendees using a spare Android phone running the free SMS Gateway for Android app. The username and password below are the cloud credentials the phone app shows you when you register — they are nothing to do with your login here or this site's own API keys. Message text and recipient numbers are end-to-end encrypted with your passphrase before they leave this server, so enter the same passphrase you set in the phone app. Setup guide.
sms.settings.username_placeholder: Cloud username from the SMS Gateway app
sms.settings.password_placeholder: Cloud password from the SMS Gateway app
sms.settings.passphrase_help: This passphrase is the only thing protecting your attendees' phone numbers and messages once they leave this server, so make it long and unique — at least 12 characters. Set the exact same passphrase in the phone app, or messages can't be decrypted.
sms.settings.webhook_note: To receive delivery reports and replies, set this secret to match the app's webhook signing key and point the app's webhook at /sms/webhook on this site.
sms.page.title: Text messages
sms.contact.title: Contact: {name}
sms.contact.heading: Contact {name}
sms.contact.not_configured: The SMS gateway is not configured. An owner must set the gateway credentials and end-to-end key in settings before texts can be sent.
